agent.name: Ghost Maps Review Guardian
agent.description: Autonomous agent that monitors on-chain review attestations on Base, investigates fraud patterns (sybil clusters, spam, coordinated attacks), and publishes transparent verification verdicts as EAS attestations. Verified reviews earn GHOST tokens via a quadratic reward curve.

capabilities.description: Analyze on-chain review attestations for legitimacy, sybil attacks, and spam patterns. Publish transparent verification verdicts as EAS attestations.
Distribute GHOST ERC-20 tokens to reviewers whose reviews are verified as legitimate, using a quadratic reward curve based on review quality score.

tools.name: queryNewReviews
tools.description: Fetch new review attestations from EAS GraphQL since a given timestamp

tools.name: queryWalletHistory
tools.description: Fetch all reviews by a specific wallet address across all places

tools.name: queryPlaceReviews
tools.description: Fetch all reviews for a specific place

tools.name: publishVerification
tools.description: Publish a verification attestation on-chain for a single review (legitimate, suspicious, or spam)

tools.name: publishSybilAlert
tools.description: Publish sybil alert attestations for multiple coordinated fake reviews
